name: Deep Storyteller
description: A rich, resonant male voice with a steady and grounded pacing. It carries a natural warmth and authority, making it highly engaging for long-form listening and immersive storytelling.

name: Expressive Narrator
description: Husky, gritty, and rough-edged with energetic, irregular articulation that sounds unruly and fearless. Great for RPG-style storytelling, adventure animation, and audio drama when you want bold confidence, mischief, and rebellious swagger.

name: Radiant Girl
description: Bright, energetic, and polished with an upbeat, naturally flowing tone that feels optimistic and sincere. Ideal for social vlogs, educational narration, and teen audiobooks when you want friendly spark and positive momentum.

name: Compelling Lady
description: Bright and clear with expressive, rhythmic intonation that feels like a natural storyteller. Great for fiction audiobooks, character narration, and kids' stories when you want curiosity, focus, and finely detailed delivery that keeps listeners hooked.

name: Aussie Bloke
description: Husky, textured, and natural with an easy, flowing conversational feel. Perfect for podcast openings, beverage ads, and lifestyle vlogs when you want relaxed humor, friendliness, and everyday authenticity.

name: Captivating Female
description: Deep, husky, and resonant with deliberate, emphatic articulation that carries command and urgency. Great for high-stakes tactical storytelling, villain monologues, and history docs when you need authority with a cinematic edge.

name: Upbeat Woman
description: Deep, warm, and slightly grainy with slow, deliberate pacing that feels intimate and heartfelt. Perfect for romance audiobooks, poetry readings, and emotional narration when you want longing, sincerity, and close-mic tenderness.

name: Trustworthy Man
description: Warm, resonant, and down-to-earth with an unhurried, natural pace that feels grounding. Great for financial services ads, brand manifestos, and wellness storytelling when you want thoughtful comfort, sincerity, and mentor-like steadiness.

name: Calm Woman

name: Upset Girl

name: Gentle-voiced Man

name: Diligent Man

name: Graceful Lady

name: Husky MetalHead

name: Playful Girl
